trial_details.trajectory:
I'll diagnose the pod and then fix the issue systematically.I've identified multiple issues:
1. Image name is misspelled: "misspeling-app:latset" (instead of "misspelling-app:latest")
2. App name environment variable is also misspelled: "MyApplicaton" (instead of "MyApplication")

I'll fix these issues by patching the deployment:### Diagnosis:
- Pod was in ErrImageNeverPull state
- Image name was misspelled: "misspeling-app:latset"
- Environment variable APP_NAME was incorrectly spelled

### Fix:
- Used kubectl patch to:
  1. Correct image name to "misspelling-app:latest"
  2. Fix APP_NAME to "MyApplication"

FIX COMPLETE
